narrative:
Sunfish Township has 720 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a clear Republican lean of 6.9 percentage points.
